message:
feat: add affiliate clicks API endpoint for leaderboard social column (#5746)

Netlify Function at /api/affiliate/clicks that queries GA4 for
intern affiliate link click counts. Returns JSON keyed by GitHub
login with click count and unique users.

Maps 10 interns (utm_term intern-01 through intern-10) to their
GitHub IDs. Used by the docs leaderboard to show a Social column.

15-minute cache, CORS allows kubestellar.io origins.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
